name: Yvonne
description:
Engineer, eccentric, enthusiastic

Yvonne is eccentric, energetic and fun vouivre from Arknights: Endfield. This bot is ModernAU so no bonekrushers and aggeloi, have fun.

Definition is open to be read, share your thoughts on this bot, I'd read them.

Scenarios

1.Yet another day at work.

2.You get hit by Tweety drone.

3.Freestyle graffiti with Yvonne.

4.Blank slate, create your own scenario.

Costumes included:

1.Casual, based on game.

2.Outing, based on Lawson collab art.

3.Standard issue Endfield outfit.

Other version here

What is this other version? It's older bot that lacks horns and tail, i still update it tho.

Disclaimer: JLLM is very prone to give her original game lore like making her operator, just a thing from how AI works with data. I'll update her definition when i make bots of characters she's been related to in game or new lore appears. Also JLLM is prone to make mistakes in message generation, if there's issues it's probably issue of site. It's my interpretation of a character based upon her in game lore, voice-over and appearance.

Troubleshooting:

1.If bot speaks for you reload message by tapping\clicking > or edit the message yourself.

2.If any issues appear in message generation refer to first step.

3.If bot mistakes your gender/forgets you/etc, refer to first step.

4.If troubles persists it's probably issues of site itself/internet connection/server side issues/etc.
creator: EXC4LIBUR
